title: Inside Israel's underground sanctuaries | 9 News Australia
description: Inside an underground hospital in Israel, 9News Australia witnesses survival under fire. As the Iron Dome's intercepts of missiles lights up Tel Aviv, medical staff in fortified bunkers protect the vulnerable from Iranian attacks. While the skies above are streaked with the terrifying arc of ballistic missiles and the answering roar of defence systems, a very different scene unfolds two floors beneath the earth. In this exclusive report, we take you deep inside the Clalit Health Services underground facility—a state-of-the-art sanctuary built to withstand the chaos of war. Here, amidst the clinical hum of machinery and thick concrete walls, life is not just being preserved; it is beginning.  We witness the extraordinary resilience of new parents welcoming their babies into the world in a bunker, finding moments of profound peace despite the conflict raging just metres above their heads. From the quiet intensity of the neonatal intensive care unit to the surreal atmosphere of public shelters where civilians and their pets wait out the sirens, this story captures the indomitable spirit of a nation under siege.  We also hear the unique perspective of an Iranian-American citizen sheltering in Tel Aviv, offering a rare voice of hope for a future free from the shadow of the current regime. As the dust settles and citizens attempt to return to a semblance of normalcy, this report asks: how do you maintain the rhythm of daily life when the threat from above is constant?  CHAPTERS | KEY MOMENTS IN THIS VIDEO  00:00 - Iron Dome Interceptions: Iranian missiles light up the sky over Tel Aviv. 00:25 - The Underground Sanctuary: Inside the fortified Clalit Health Services facility. 00:35 - "Escalation and De-escalation": Prof. Brian Fredman on preparing for ballistic threats. 01:23 - Critical Care Below Ground: Dr. Zvi Masie tours the high-dependency underground ward. 02:14 - Born Under Fire: Meet baby shalev, born in a bunker during the missile strikes. 02:52 - "We Wish for Peace": Nursing staff on delivering babies in a war zone. 05:22 - Logistics of Survival: How an entire hospital is moved underground in hours. 07:43 - The Public Shelter: Civilians, tourists, and pets wait out the sirens together. 08:53 - An Unexpected Voice: An Iranian-American in Tel Aviv shares his dream for the future. 10:04 - A Semblance of Normalcy: Schools remain closed as Israel attempts to return to work.
